summary: Verified pixel-focused rebuild of AppLayout (Sidebar+TopBar) and Dashboard page via Playwright + code review. Login works, sidebar is 210px with icon badges (active=blue bg+white icon), My Actor switcher unchanged, TopBar shows current actor name (Amina Yusuf) + notification bell + account dropdown with Logout (successfully logs out to /login). Dashboard shows correct welcome text, 5 stat cards with correct real counts (5/1/1/2/5), 3 donut charts render at proper size (499x260) with visible colored slices and legends, tab switching works (Transaction overview shows placeholder text), filter dropdowns open without errors. Regression check on Actors/Beekeepers/Villages/Connections nav + Actor Detail page (heading now in content area, all fields/tabs/progress bar intact) - zero functional regressions. Zero console errors/warnings observed across entire session.
critical_code_review_comments: Sidebar.jsx/TopBar.jsx/AppLayout.jsx cleanly implement the new structure per spec; NavIcon 40px badge, Lato 13px labels, active/inactive color states all correctly coded.
Dashboard.jsx uses isAnimationActive=false on Pie charts as intended to avoid tiny-render bug - confirmed charts render at full size (499x260) not tiny slivers.
Country/Level 1 actor filter dropdowns are informational-only (not wired to filter charts) as explicitly scoped - not a bug, noted as backlog per problem statement.
AppLayout title prop now renders as simple in-content h2 heading - confirmed working on Actor Detail and Actors-Actual pages with zero visual/functional issues.
test_credentials: Used kkwestafrique@gmail.com / BeeswaxMIS@2026! from /app/memory/test_credentials.md - worked correctly
context_for_next_testing_agent: This round (iteration_3) confirmed: new Sidebar/TopBar layout (210px sidebar, icon badges, actor-name topbar, account dropdown logout), fully rebuilt Dashboard with real stat cards + 3 properly-sized donut charts + working tabs, and zero regressions in Actors/Beekeepers/Villages/Connections/Detail pages after title-in-content-area change. All previously covered CRUD/auth/RLS flows (iteration_1) and visual styling (iteration_2) remain intact. No bugs found across 2 full Playwright sessions covering login, dashboard, sidebar nav/submenu, my-actor-switcher, topbar account menu, logout, actor detail, and list pages.
rca of the issue: No RCA needed - no issues/bugs found.
